title: Lemonade Continues U.S. Expansion With Launch of Car Insurance in Indiana
text: Lemonade continues U.S. expansion launching car insurance in Indiana. Car insurance product now available in states representing roughly half U.S. market. More specifically, Lemonade Car available in states representing approximately 42% U.S. car insurance market as of July 2025. Strategic approach: Lemonade Car key growth driver in company strategy. Q1 2025 marked first quarter where Car's sequential in-force premium growth outpaced rest of Lemonade's book, underscoring accelerating momentum. Following recent launch Colorado, Indiana next in series state rollouts planned 2025. Operational advantages: regulatory and compliance processes allow faster state launches, compressing timelines from months to days. Autonomous vehicle insurance strategy: plans continue rolling out autonomous car product to more U.S. states, goal reaching majority population 2027. Cross-selling strategy: investing in technology better cross-sell products, particularly car and home insurance. Over 5% customers holding multiple policies, nearly 20% in-force premium from multi-policy holders. Lemonade expects efficient growth driver without proportional marketing spend increases.
